title: Dubai visa rules 2026: 10 major UAE visa changes expats, workers and tourists need to know
summary_full: The UAE is significantly overhauling its visa and residency rules, introducing expanded Golden Visa benefits, a new Blue Visa for environmental leaders, and specialized permits for emerging industries. These reforms aim to attract global talent and simplify travel, with a proposed GCC Grand Tours visa potentially revolutionizing regional tourism.
